title: Claude Daily Watch 2026-04-15: Code Routines, Desktop Redesign, Prompt Cache 1hr TTL, Model Deprecation
summary: Major releases on April 14: Claude Code Routines (cloud-hosted scheduled automations, research preview, up to 25/day on Team/Enterprise); Claude Code Desktop redesign (parallel sessions, integrated terminal, HTML/PDF preview); CHANGELOG v2.1.108 adds 1-hr prompt cache TTL env var and /recap session context; v2.1.105 adds PreCompact hooks and plugin background monitors. Model deprecation alert: claude-sonnet-4-20250514 and claude-opus-4-20250514 retire June 15 2026 — migrate to 4.6 variants.
features_covered: Claude Code Routines (research preview) — cloud-hosted scheduled automations
Claude Code Desktop Redesign — parallel sessions, integrated terminal, diff viewer
CHANGELOG v2.1.108 — ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H env var, /recap, Skill-invocable slash commands, /undo alias
CHANGELOG v2.1.105 — PreCompact hook, plugin background monitors, EnterWorktree path param, skill description cap 1536 chars, WebFetch style stripping
Project Glasswing + Claude Mythos Preview — defensive cybersecurity, invite-only
